title: SINGLE PORT ROBOTIC NEPHROURETERECTOMY VIA SUPINE ANTERIOR APPROACH: STEP BY STEP TECHNIQUE
author: Spena, Gianluca
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Our aim is to describe the surgical steps of the first Da Vinci Single Port Nephroureterectomy (SP-RANU) reported in Europe and demonstrate the safety and feasibility of the procedure via supine anterior retroperitoneal access. This new platform, recently approved for use in Europe, offers advantages for both patients (smaller skin incision, faster discharge from hospital, less postoperative pain) and surgeons (totally retroperitoneal multi-quadrant surgery). SP-RANU has the potential to become a competitive player in the surgical armamentarium for the treatment of UTUC.
